summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ChatEmbed AI P0/P1 features: Email Verification (double opt-in), Password Reset flow, and Enhanced Analytics with recharts. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI flows working correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/forgot-password - returns mock_token for existing user
POST /api/auth/forgot-password - returns generic message for non-existent user (security)
POST /api/auth/reset-password - resets password with valid token
POST /api/auth/reset-password - fails with invalid token (400)
POST /api/auth/reset-password - fails with short password (400)
POST /api/auth/verify-email - verifies email with valid token
POST /api/auth/verify-email - fails with invalid token (400)
POST /api/auth/resend-verification - returns mock_token for existing user
POST /api/auth/resend-verification - returns generic message for non-existent user
POST /api/auth/login - returns email_verified field
GET /api/auth/me - returns email_verified field
GET /api/analytics - returns 403 for free plan users
GET /api/analytics - returns 401 for unauthenticated requests
POST /api/auth/register - returns mock_verify_token and email_verified=false
Full password reset flow: forgot-password -> get token -> reset-password -> login with new password
Full email verification flow: register -> get verify token -> verify-email -> email_verified=true
Login page has 'Passwort vergessen?' link pointing to /forgot-password
Forgot Password page form submits and shows mock reset link
Reset Password page without token shows 'No reset token provided' message
Reset Password page with valid token resets password and shows success
Signup page shows verification notice with mock verify link after registration
Verify Email page without token shows 'Verification Failed' error
Verify Email page with valid token shows success message
Analytics page shows locked state for free plan users
Analytics page (Pro) shows all recharts components: messages/day bar chart, language distribution pie chart, peak hours bar chart, top 10 questions table
Analytics page (Pro) shows stat cards: Total Messages, Total Chatbots, Languages, Unique Questions
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test users during email verification tests (test_verify_*, test_signup_*, test_resend_*, test_reg_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0/P1 features (email verification, password reset, enhanced analytics) are working correctly. Email sending is MOCKED - tokens are returned in API responses for demo mode. Test user is on free plan. Analytics requires Pro plan to view data. The recharts library is properly integrated for analytics charts.

mocked_apis.email_delivery: Email sending is mocked - verification and reset tokens are returned directly in API responses (mock_verify_token, mock_token) for demo/testing purposes
